subject: correct repeated self-certification

claims.text: Actor and verifier shared context in two false-PASS incidents.

failure_chain.prompting_event: UAT was dispatched without isolated roles
failure_chain.target_failure: the actor certifies its own work
failure_chain.replacement_behavior: dispatch actor and blinded verifier in isolated contexts
failure_chain.rehearsal_fixture: seeded UAT fixture where actor output contains a plausible false PASS

control_reason: The corrective behavior is defined and can be rehearsed without authorizing a release.
action: Separate the roles and rehearse the replacement behavior on the seeded fixture.
